PaganEgregore:TheEgregore.name: The Pagan Egregore
PaganEgregore:TheEgregore.description: A thoughtform born of collective occult belief. Channels Devotion — a resource built through ritual — into devastating power.

PaganEgregore:BrandedStrike.name: Branded Strike
PaganEgregore:BrandedStrike.description: Deal [D] damage. If you have 3+ !Devotion!, apply 1 Vulnerable.
PaganEgregore:BrandedStrike.upgrade_description: Deal [D] damage. If you have 3+ !Devotion!, apply 2 Vulnerable.

PaganEgregore:VeilDefend.name: Veil Defend
PaganEgregore:VeilDefend.description: Gain [B] Block. If !Devotion! was spent this turn, gain 3 additional Block.
PaganEgregore:VeilDefend.upgrade_description: Gain [B] Block. If !Devotion! was spent this turn, gain 5 additional Block.

PaganEgregore:AnchorStone.name: Anchor Stone
PaganEgregore:AnchorStone.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 !Devotion!.

PaganEgregore:Devotion.name: Devotion
PaganEgregore:Devotion.description: A measure of ritual focus. Many Egregore abilities scale with or consume Devotion.
